ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition associated with the task */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the task (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "max_time_allowed" INTEGER /* Maximum time allowed to complete the task in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_cond_id FOREIGN KEY ("cond_id") REFERENCES conditions ("cond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "cond_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "cond_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., image, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the question */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question */,
  "exists" INTEGER /* Whether the question exists in the system */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "answer_type" TEXT /* Type of answer expected (e.g., text, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question associated with the answer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the answer */,
  "answer" TEXT /* The answer provided by the user */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to provide the answer in seconds */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was submitted */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the answer (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES questions ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_task_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task completed by the user */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the task completion (e.g., complete, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_task_history_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_task_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_quest_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was asked the question */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question asked to the user */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the question completion (e.g., complete, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_quest_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_quest_history_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES questions ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metric */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, completion rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., response time, throughput) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dataset_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
